## Summary

<!-- One or two sentences explaining the change and its motivation. -->

## Type

<!-- Mark with [x] -->
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing behaviour to change)
- [ ] Refactor (no functional change)
- [ ] Docs / tooling / CI

## Test plan

<!-- How did you verify this? Be specific. Check off any that apply. -->
- [ ] Unit tests added / updated (`frontend/src/**/__tests__/`, `backend/src/**/*.test.ts`)
- [ ] Contract tests added / updated (`frontend/tests/contract/`)
- [ ] E2E test added / updated (`frontend/e2e/`)
- [ ] Manually verified in `docker compose up` against the seed data
- [ ] No tests required (docs / CI / config only)

## CI

<!-- All CI jobs must be green before merge. -->
- [ ] Backend Lint
- [ ] Backend Tests
- [ ] Frontend Lint
- [ ] Frontend Tests
- [ ] frontend-e2e
- [ ] frontend-contract
- [ ] frontend-storybook
- [ ] frontend-bundle
- [ ] Security Audit

## Linked issue

<!-- e.g. "Closes #123" or "Refs #45" -->

## Screenshots / videos (UI changes only)

<!-- Drag-and-drop here. Light-mode + dark-mode if styling changed. -->

## Migration / breaking-change notes

<!-- New env var? DB migration? Config change required by ops? Note it here. -->
